zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：温和上行伴随高位震荡整理
zh.content:
ETH当前维持温和上行结构，价格站稳1760上方，短线延续震荡上攻格局，但动能有所放缓需关注短期突破1770压力位

MACD维持18上方的正向柱体，显示多头动能仍在延续，短期均线SMA20上移至1727附近提供支撑，趋势结构偏多但未

下方支撑关注1742低点与1727均线共振区，上方阻力在1772前高，进一步看1785附近密集抛压区

操作上建议以回踩1727附近分批低吸为主，若放量突破1772可顺势追多，跌破1740则需控制风险

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is maintaining a mild bullish structure against the US dollar after a gradual recovery from the intraday low near 1742. Price action is currently compressing within a short-term consolidation band between 1740 and 1770, reflecting a balanced battle between buyers and sellers. Holding above recent lows suggests improving stability, while repeated tests of the upper range indicate potential accumulation. The market is attempting to remain above its short-term trend support, signaling a cautiously constructive setup.

Momentum indicators lean supportive, with MACD at 18.06 showing positive directional bias, even though the signal line is not provided for a full crossover confirmation. Despite this limitation, the current reading implies underlying bullish pressure remains intact. Price holding above the 20-period SMA at 1727 reinforces a trend-aligned structure favoring buyers. Although RSI data is unavailable, price behavior suggests neither overextended conditions nor immediate exhaustion, leaving room for continuation if volume strengthens.

Key support is located at 1742, followed by a stronger dynamic base at the 1727 SMA(20), which is critical for maintaining the short-term uptrend. A breakdown below this zone could expose 1700 as the next psychological support area. On the upside, resistance is clearly defined at 1772, marking the recent high and immediate breakout barrier. A sustained move above this level could trigger momentum toward 1800, where historical supply pressure may begin to re-emerge.

From a trading perspective, the structure favors a cautiously bullish approach while price remains above the SMA(20). Dip entries near 1727–1742 offer relatively favorable risk-reward setups, particularly with stops positioned below 1720 to limit downside exposure. Profit targets are initially set at 1772, with extended upside potential toward 1800 on confirmed breakout strength. Traders should watch for volume expansion to validate any directional breakout attempt.
